episodes.title: COVER UP: Epstein Files Shed Light on College Crimes Across The Country
episodes.description:
In the wake of the Epstein files, many more related crimes have been brought into the public eye. Unfortunately, this new attention has revealed that many colleges and universities have either consciously ignored similar cases taking place on their campuses, or actively enabled them to continue undiscovered. The list includes schools like Columbia University and beyond. Kat Tenbarge of Spitfire News has the details. 

SUBSCRIBE to  @COURIERHQ  for more.

#columbiauniversity  #epstein #epsteinfiles

episodes.title: BOMBSHELL: Did Epstein Have A SECRET Child!?
episodes.description:
New documents from the Epstein files seem to reveal that not only did Epstein's estate pay off an accuser of both Epstein AND Trump, but that Epstein may have had a secret child as well. Mason of onehandpolitics dives into the details of what these new findings show, and what they mean for the future of the investigation.

SUBSCRIBE to  @COURIERHQ  for more.

#Epstein #EpsteinFiles #Trump
